idea-plugin.name: BABj
idea-plugin.description:
Development support for the BABj library (rs.co.bora5.programs.bab).
  • Generator — creates a DTO / Home / View / EditWindow quartet from a JPA entity following BABj conventions (Alt+Insert → BABj CRUD).
  • Live templates — bview, bwin, bhome, bdto.
  • Inspections — validate BABj view, service, DTO, and edit-window conventions, with a quick fix for generating a missing Edit<Entity>Window.
  • Navigator — gutter links and a visual tool window connect each Entity, DTO, Home, View, and EditWindow module.
  • Lifecycle Navigator — diagrams BAB event execution, branches, inherited hooks, concrete overrides, and framework side effects with direct code navigation and PNG export.
  • Smart completion — suggests valid entity properties and complete column definitions inside BABj annotations.
  • CRUD Designer — selects and orders fields, chooses edit controls, and previews the generated grid and form.
  • Extended generators — scaffolds REST endpoints, CSV/Excel imports, reports, export-enabled views, attachments, and messaging agents.
  • Agent Studio — visualizes static event routing, safety criteria, and actions, with an event-reaction simulator.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.6.0

  • ComboBox simplification — a new inspection recognizes legacy lazy DataProvider.fromFilteringCallbacks(...) refresh methods and offers an Alt+Enter quick fix to replace them with createSimpleComboBox(...) or createDependentComboBox(...). Redundant refresh methods, imports, label calls, and pure dependency listeners are removed automatically, while listeners with custom behavior are left untouched.
  • Lifecycle image sharing — the current BABj Lifecycle diagram can be copied to the system clipboard or exported as a full-size PNG image directly from the tool window.

1.5.0

  • Precise decimal editing — generated edit windows now use Vaadin BigDecimalField for BigDecimal entity properties instead of the double-based NumberField.

1.4.0

  • Lifecycle Navigator — explores event execution for concrete BAB classes as interactive diagrams, resolves inherited and overridden hooks, visualizes branches and side effects, and navigates directly to the relevant methods.
  • Safer project scanning — BABj Navigator and Agent Studio now scan in non-blocking background read actions, preventing UI freezes and PSI read-access errors.
  • Clearer generator layout — the generator is organized into Artifacts, CRUD Designer, Additional generators, and Agent tabs.
  • Controlled regeneration — existing files can be recreated when explicitly enabled and confirmed; the default behavior still preserves them.
  • Improved ColumnNames support — optional filtering and sorting boolean flags are accepted and validated, while joined paths resolve aliases declared by a View or Home getJoin() implementation.
  • Focused feature set — the project-specific settings-administration generator has been removed.

localInspection.displayName: BABj: GenericView without an Edit window
BABj: validate getSelect fields and getJoin aliases
BABj: validate @ColumnNames against entity and service DTO
BABj: legacy ComboBox setup can use a factory method

action.description: Designs and generates BABj CRUD, REST, import, export, and report artifacts from the selected JPA entity
